
██████ shouted, "HALLO, DADDY!" and punched him in his foice!

Daddy sobbed, “Why for you punch me? Your ‘daddÆ’!?” crying in the corner.

██████ replied resolutely, “It's tough—love! BABY! Isn’t it?” 💪🏽😘💪🏽

Then, she gave a list of reasons for the season:
1. Jesus (£0.99 or £1)
2. Ham Sandwich (£100)
3. Couch Gun (£99.99)
4. ████████'/████████’ büger-månchë (USD$9,999.99); and
5. Houdini’s mother-in-law’s sister's niece's husband, ‘wHo-dean-eeee’ (30°C for 30% off).

"Who owns this piece of memorabilia Americana?", ██████ asked. (Someone in the back shouted...) It is ████████'.

Is it ████████'!?

It is ████████’!!

The whole crowd erupted, “IT IS CHRISTOS’!!! ‘It is ████████'’! It is ████████'”

Daddy asked her to fax him her email address: ██████@iggle-piggle.nightgarden.co.uk; but she didn't have enough tokens...

You can download this whole episode at: https://example.com/stories/stupid-dad--alternate.
